Acceptance complete for HXC-SCAF-003, HXC-SCAF-007, and HXC-SEM-006 target-identity validation. The experiment also proved a material pin constraint: real Haxe 4.3.7 Cross predefines target.name=cross and unremovable target.utf16/utf16 before macros. ADR 0004/0007, PRD, architecture, configuration, toolchain, research, README, AGENTS, diagnostic catalog, CI, pre-commit, and live downstream notes agree that Eval is a test carrier only and its sys/threaded facts are not C capability claims. ADR 0007, ADR 0004, PRD, README, AGENTS, architecture, configuration, toolchain, provenance, research, and checked plan now agree. Rejected Haxe 4 Cross because unremovable UTF-16 facts leak to application conditionals; rejected a Haxe 4 fork because of cross-host distribution/maintenance burden; retained Eval only for future hxc bootstrap, differential oracle, and isolation. Exact official platform artifact hashes are lock-checked. Completed E1.T07 and HXC-COMP-009/011/012 with a typed filesystem-independent CProjectEmissionPlan, closed artifact/configuration variants, validated SHA-256 GeneratedFile values, deterministic UTF-8 ordering, merged build-fact provenance, finalized symbol/runtime/ABI/stdlib/manifest sidecars, and a fail-closed ReflaxeOutputWriter. The writer prevalidates old ownership and the complete new set, rejects traversal, existing and dangling output-root/descendant symlinks, duplicate or malformed ownership entries, and unowned collisions before delegating writes and stale removal to OutputManager. Executable evidence in test/project_emitter proves byte identity across absolute roots and discovery order, verified content hashes, unchanged-file mtime preservation, safe stale cleanup, user-file survival, no partial output on failures, and the unchanged production HXC1000 boundary; strict native lanes independently compile every emitted header and link/run the structural C11 project. Evidence passed: npm test; scripts/hooks/pre-commit; python3 test/project_emitter/run.py; npm run snapshots:check; bd dep cycles --json; bd lint --json. Compatibility: one typed plan models portable and metal plus all ratified runtime-policy/environment values without selecting hxrt; placeholders explicitly deny runtime, stdlib, export, or no-runtime proof; generated-Haxe lowering still emits nothing; the structural C is strict C11; public ABI remains experimental. CMake/Meson adapters remain E1.T08 and broader adversarial expansion remains E1.T09. Root AGENTS.md now requires explicit Haxe models and exhaustive closed variants, forbids Reflect, Dynamic, Any, untyped, open maps, and unchecked casts as model substitutes, and confines inherently untyped external APIs to validated typed adapters with malformed-input tests.

Acceptance complete for HXC-COMP-009, HXC-COMP-012, and HXC-QA-007. The project-emitter harness now compares UTF-8-ordered artifact paths as raw bytes and reports the first path plus exact changed, EOF, or missing-artifact offset. Executable cases prove byte identity across separately isolated roots, reversed unit/build-fact/symbol discovery, an explicit C.UTF-8 locale, CRLF Haxe/HXML input from an absolute classpath, and cold versus warm Haxe compiler-server requests. Full-to-renamed symbol/module transitions delete every former compiler-owned payload, preserve an unlisted neighboring source, and match a fresh renamed build. Normal artifacts are checked for host paths, carriage returns, timestamp and UUID shapes, unstable JSON keys, hidden hxrt selection, and unchanged production HXC1000 behavior; malformed line endings fail before partial output. Reflaxe invocation metadata is validated separately rather than normalized away. npm test passed the pinned toolchain, all 77 owned Haxe modules, focused suites, 8 snapshot suites, Apple Clang strict C11/C++17 native matrix, and 20 governance tests; pre-commit, bd lint, bd dep cycles, and git diff --check passed. Local auto-native correctly skipped the unavailable independent GCC family; required CI lanes retain GCC and Clang. This is structural fixture/test and governance work only: portable/metal behavior, runtime policy, environments, generated-Haxe semantics, and public ABI are unchanged, and production lowering remains fail-closed. Root AGENTS now also records the owner-directed hard compiler-first stdlib hierarchy and evidence-backed hxrt performance rule.

Completed E2.T01 and HXC-SEM-001/003/005. Added accepted ADR 0008 plus the schema-validated primitive semantics contract; typed Haxe primitive mapping and HxcIR schema 2 conversion/nullability forms; deterministic portable/metal representation rules; strict tests for widening, narrowing, signed and unsigned behavior, NaN, infinities, negative zero, overflow, and nullable values. The compiler slice uses the Haxe type system, explicitly rejects source Dynamic, contains no Any, Reflect, or untyped escape, emits no primitive hxrt dependency, and never guesses ABI widths or uses host-dependent long. Production lowering remains honestly fail-closed at HXC1000. npm test, pre-commit, snapshots, Beads lint/cycle checks, and GitHub Governance run 29444783049 including required GCC and Clang lanes all passed.

Implemented the real pinned-Haxe TypedExpr to validated HxcIR to structural C body slice for Void, Bool, Int, UInt, and Float constants, initialized locals and reads, cleanup-free nested blocks, and validated void/value returns. Added deterministic shadow-safe CSymbolRegistry naming, repository-relative source spans, optional structural line directives, exact HXC1001 unsupported-node diagnostics, runtime-free portable/metal evidence, and the honest E2.T03 HXC1000 production boundary. Added docs, registered fixtures and snapshots, required GCC/Clang O0/O2 native CI, hook/toolchain/governance wiring, and HxcIR type-invariant negatives. Verified with npm test, scripts/hooks/pre-commit, bd lint, and bd dep cycles. Code commit: 2323a4b.

Completed E2.T03 in commits cd210ba, 2216eb8, and 1aef011. Evidence: typed reachable static graph; deterministic private prototypes and definitions; exact hosted int main(void); explicit left-to-right HxcIR arguments and primitive conversions; scoped source-positioned HXC1001 for default, optional, and rest parameters; direct self-tail swaps materialized through registry-named typed temporaries before structural looping; mutually recursive non-returning members partitioned into deterministic strict-C11 translation units; C11 _Noreturn and unreachable-return removal; analyzed runtime-free, no-export, and no-stdlib sidecars with no hxrt. Validation: npm test; scripts/hooks/pre-commit; npm run snapshots:check; required remote Governance run 29455867306 passed pinned-toolchain, license/governance, GCC 13 and Clang native lanes, including function lowering at O0/O2 with warnings as errors and infinite-recursion diagnostics enabled. Compatibility: portable and metal primitive C remain semantically identical; default auto/minimal and explicit runtime-none remain runtime-free; hosted is supported while non-hosted remains fail-closed HXC1000; closed cycles may add private source files but no public C ABI or runtime dependency was introduced.

Completed E2.T04 in commit fcb91fa. The compiler now eagerly captures typed entry, reachable static function, and primitive static-field expressions at filterTypes; lowers calls and arguments left-to-right, assignments, local/global places, Bool short circuit, value-form ternaries, and UInt prefix/postfix increment into validated multi-block HxcIR; and emits structural strict C11 with stable typed temporaries for every load and consumed call result. Constants, parameters, and proven-total pure static operations over stabilized inputs are the only current elision set. Indexed compound-assignment order is fixed by the representation-neutral HxcIR fixture and Eval oracle while source TArray lowering remains owned by E2.T08. Added deterministic portable/metal/reversed/repeated snapshots, production runtime-none proof, strict native differential harnesses, canonical positive/snapshot/runtime/differential cases, documentation, package/pre-commit/toolchain/governance wiring, and runtime-plan decisions. Evidence: npm test; bash scripts/hooks/pre-commit; npm run snapshots:check; python3 scripts/ci/check_fixture_policy.py; python3 scripts/ci/check_ci_policy.py; git diff --check; bd dep cycles --json; bd lint --json. GitHub Governance run 29459814167 passed pinned-toolchain, license/provenance, required GCC, and required Clang, including generated evaluation-order execution at O0 and O2. Compatibility: portable and metal emit identical primitive sequencing; auto, minimal, and explicit none remain runtime-free with no hxrt artifacts or symbols; hosted executable behavior advances without public exports or ABI stabilization. General statement control flow, UB-safe signed arithmetic/decrement, and source array representation remain fail-closed for E2.T06, E2.T05, and E2.T08. Pre-existing untyped boundary cleanup is separately tracked as discovered-from issue haxe_c-6h2.1.

Implemented typed UB-safe Int, UInt, Float, and Std.int lowering through direct strict C or request-local static-inline compiler helpers, with no hxrt selection. Added deterministic HxcIR/C/symbol/build snapshots, Eval differential coverage, modulo/divide/shift/overflow/bit boundaries, runtime-none proof, O0/O2 inspection, UBSan, and required GCC/Clang CI lanes. Updated ADR 0008, primitive schema/contract, architecture/product docs, fixture governance, and root commit-message guidance. Verified with npm test, scripts/hooks/pre-commit, 13-suite snapshots, local Apple Clang strict native checks, and successful GitHub Governance run 29464095525 for commit 79afc11, including required Linux GCC and Clang arithmetic jobs. Deferred arrays, objects, strings, exceptions, general stdlib support, and runtime-backed features to their owning beads.

Completed E2.T06 in commit cd6bb19. The compiler now lowers typed Haxe if expressions and statements, exact lazy Boolean operators, while and do-while loops, pinned Int range loops, Int statement and value switches, break, and continue into explicit ordered HxcIR blocks and edges before structural C emission. Switch subjects are evaluated once, every C case and default transfers explicitly, nested loop targets are lexical and deterministic, and value-switch carriers are initialized only after a structural proof that every arm assigns the same typed local. Unsupported throw and unreachable statements retain source-positioned stable diagnostics instead of being guessed or emitted as raw C. Added deterministic HxcIR/C/symbol snapshots, validator negatives, Eval differential execution, nested break and continue coverage, exact short-circuit side-effect checks, optimized native execution, profile comparison, runtime-none proof, fixture taxonomy records, and updated architecture and lowering documentation. Evidence: npm test; scripts/hooks/pre-commit; npm run snapshots:check; bd dep cycles --json; bd lint --json. GitHub Governance run 29467351019 passed pinned-toolchain, license and provenance, required GCC, and required Clang, including generated control-flow execution at O0 and O2. Compatibility: portable and metal emit the same control-flow semantics; selected auto, minimal, and explicit none paths remain runtime-free with no hxrt include, source, feature, or symbol; no public C ABI was added or stabilized. Pattern, enum, String, Float, and fallthrough switches, arbitrary iterators, cleanup-bearing exits, and exception lowering remain deliberately fail-closed for their owning future work.

Implemented typed nonempty c.CArray literal storage, local c.Span and c.ConstSpan borrows, safe indexing, and direct size_t indexed iteration through validated HxcIR and structural strict C11. Bounds policies explicitly preserve portable or metal profile plus debug, release, or minsizerel build provenance; exact static and typed loop proofs are validator-checked, while dynamic negative and upper bounds fail-stop through standard C abort. Runtime-none production records an analyzed empty plan and links no hxrt artifact or symbol. Verified with npm test, the full pre-commit hook, npm run test:span-lowering, npm run snapshots:check, strict local Clang C11 O0 and O2 execution, out-of-bounds failure cases, and required GCC and Clang GitHub Governance run 29471320786. Reviewable artifacts are docs/span-lowering.md and test/span_lowering/expected/{span.hxcir,program.h,program.c,symbols.json}. General Array, empty arrays, escaping views, broader elements and operations, length and slicing, and stable public ABI remain explicitly deferred and fail closed.
